what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG bookmark outline icon using a single stroked path with no fill.
observations: The icon is drawn with stroke="currentColor" and fill="none".
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
A single path draws a bookmark shape from x=6 to x=18 with a lower center notch at 12,16.
standouts: Color inherits from current text color.
conventions: Uses inline SVG attributes common to icon assets.
Follows a stroke-only outline icon convention.
Uses rounded stroke terminals and joins.
concerns: No title, desc, or aria metadata is present in the SVG itself.
notes: A compact currentColor bookmark icon asset intended to inherit styling from its rendering context.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by the consuming component or embedded in the SVG?
Is the 1.5 stroke width part of a shared icon stroke convention?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a bookmark icon, and the SVG path renders a bookmark outline.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a neutral bookmark icon that can adapt to surrounding color without internal styling dependencies.
contribution: Contributes a reusable bookmark glyph with simple geometry, currentColor styling, and stroke-based visual language for a fused design asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This is a single-path 24x24 SVG bookmark outline icon using currentColor stroke, no fill, and rounded stroke styling.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable bookmark icon asset that inherits color from its usage context.
